column1: Dates are approximate; some sects' origins overlap due to gradual schism processes1368.
"Main Founder/Origin" often refers to a leading figure or the branch from which the school split.
"Empire/Royal Line" is the dominant polity at the time/location of the school's formation.
"Core Texts" lists the main canonical or doctrinal works associated with the school.
Theravāda is the only Nikāya school surviving today, with the Pali Canon as its scriptural foundation4.
